source: AISC Steel Construction Manual, 16th Edition (2026 reference)
note: Comprehensive steel shapes database including W, S, HP, M, C, MC, L, WT, HSS Rectangular, HSS Square, HSS Round, and Pipe shapes. All dimensions in inches, weights in lb/ft, areas in in², moments of inertia in in⁴, section moduli in in³.

plate_weights.note: Weight per square foot by thickness (lb/ft²). Multiply by area to get total weight.

bolt_data.note: Common structural bolt sizes and capacities per AISC/RCSC

a325_shear_capacity_kips.note: Single shear, threads NOT excluded (N), bearing-type connection

a490_shear_capacity_kips.note: Single shear, threads NOT excluded (N), bearing-type connection

weld_data.note: Fillet weld capacity per AISC 360 using E70XX electrodes

fillet_weld_capacity_kips_per_in.note: Strength per inch of weld length by weld leg size

minimum_fillet_weld_size.note: Minimum fillet weld size based on thicker part joined (AISC Table J2.4)
